title: Tremble (Abridged)
subtitle: A modern declaration of truth
lyrics:
[Verse 1]
In the name of the Father, in the name of the Son,
In the name of the Spirit, Lord, we come.
We are gathered together to lift up Your name,
To call on our Father, to fall on His grace.

[Pre-Chorus]
I still believe You're the same,
I still believe You reign,
Powerful, mighty, unchanging,
Wonder-working, never-failing God.

[Chorus]
You are faithful, You are faithful,
Every promise You have made,
You are faithful, You are faithful,
Let the redeemed say, "Amen."

[Verse 2]
In the name of the Father, in the name of the Son,
In the name of the Spirit, Lord, we come.
We are gathered together to lift up Your name,
To call on our Father, to fall on His grace.

[Pre-Chorus]

[Chorus]

[Bridge]
The name above all names
Is the name of Jesus
The name above all names
Is the name of Jesus
chords:
A        E        F#m       D
In the name of the Father, in the name of the Son
A        E        D         A
In the name of the Spirit, Lord we come
reflection: The Spirit inside you is not a Spirit of fear. The fear is the lie. The Spirit is the truth.
